notes:
NovaPanel v0.7.31

- Helper extract: per-entry CRC32 + ASAR-open validation for critical files. v0.7.29s node-native extractor activated in production (proven by extraction method log line) and produced a non-zero-size app.asar that the asar parser nonetheless rejected with Invalid package. Bytes wrong, not size wrong. v0.7.31 adds the only verification that catches content corruption: CRC32 over decompressed bytes compared to the central-directorys declared crc32 field.
- extractZipToDir captures crc32Expected from each CD entry (+16) and a CRITICAL_ENTRIES set of resources/app.asar and NovaPanel.exe. After decompression of a critical entry, _crc32(writeBuf) is computed and compared to crc32Expected. Mismatch throws CRC32 mismatch for <name>: expected=0xAAAA actual=0xBBBB. Function returns { extracted, totalBytes, criticalResults: { name: {compSize, uncompSize, writtenSize, crcExpected, crcActual, method} } } so PHASE 3 can log decisive evidence.
- PHASE 3 logs for app.asar: ZIP compressed size, ZIP uncompressed size, written size, CRC expected (hex), CRC actual (hex). After the existing size-parity check passes, the asar file is opened via the v0.7.19 inspectAsar(); ok=false throws POST-EXTRACT integrity: asar is invalid: <category - message>. interior versions.json / package.json read failures land in the same path.
- No changes to updater trigger, runner staging, copy phase, verify phase, relaunch, test-update, UI, or build scripts.
